Operation 'getSessionPerson' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. While the summary is adequate, the description lacks specificity about what personal data is returned and the response format. Adding reference to the PersonResponse schema and clarifying that this returns extracted/verified identity information improves AI agent interpretability for understanding what data will be available.

data.current_description: Get data about the person verified in the session.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve extracted personal information about the individual verified in the session. Returns the PersonResponse object containing verified identity data collected during the verification process.
data.reasoning: While the summary is adequate, the description lacks specificity about what personal data is returned and the response format. Adding reference to the PersonResponse schema and clarifying that this returns extracted/verified identity information improves AI agent interpretability for understanding what data will be available.

message: Operation 'getMedia' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. The description is too generic and doesn't clarify what types of media are returned or the response format. Adding context about media types (documents, selfies, etc.) and clarifying that both content and metadata are returned helps AI agents understand the operation's scope and what to expect from the response.

data.current_description: Retrieve a specific media file using media ID.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a specific media file uploaded during verification using its media ID. Returns the media file content and metadata. Media files may include identity documents, selfies, or other verification materials collected during the session.
data.reasoning: The description is too generic and doesn't clarify what types of media are returned or the response format. Adding context about media types (documents, selfies, etc.) and clarifying that both content and metadata are returned helps AI agents understand the operation's scope and what to expect from the response.

message: Operation 'getFraudCategories' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. While the summary is adequate, the description lacks clarity about the response format and the purpose of retrieving categories. Clarifying that this returns valid category options for use in fraud report submissions helps AI agents understand the relationship between this operation and submitFraudReport, improving overall workflow interpretability.

data.current_description: Get a list of available fraud categories that can be reported.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the list of available fraud categories that can be used when submitting fraud reports. Returns all valid fraud category options for classification and reporting of fraudulent verification sessions.
data.reasoning: While the summary is adequate, the description lacks clarity about the response format and the purpose of retrieving categories. Clarifying that this returns valid category options for use in fraud report submissions helps AI agents understand the relationship between this operation and submitFraudReport, improving overall workflow interpretability.

message: Operation 'deleteSession' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_side_effects. Original description is vague about the operation's scope and side effects. Added clarity about data deletion scope, production limitations, permanence of the action, and guidance on enabling the feature. This helps AI agents understand when and how to use this operation safely.

data.current_description: Delete a verification session. Useful for testing. Not available by default.
data.description_suggestion: Deletes a verification session and all associated data. This operation is primarily intended for testing purposes and is not enabled by default in production environments. Contact Veriff support to enable this capability if needed. Deletion is permanent and cannot be reversed.
data.reasoning: Original description is vague about the operation's scope and side effects. Added clarity about data deletion scope, production limitations, permanence of the action, and guidance on enabling the feature. This helps AI agents understand when and how to use this operation safely.

message: Operation 'createSessionValidateRegistry' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context, missing_output_details. Summary uses 'national ID' generically when context indicates Mexican registries. Description lacks clarity about the registry scope, what validation results are returned, and the combined nature of the operation. Enhanced version specifies Mexican registry context, explains the streamlined workflow, clarifies outputs, and notes input requirements for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_summary: Create session and validate national ID
data.current_description: Create a session and validate the person's national ID number (SSN) with provided data.
data.summary_suggestion: Create session with national ID validation
data.description_suggestion: Creates a verification session and simultaneously validates the provided national ID number against Mexican registry data. This combined operation streamlines the verification process for users with available registry information. Returns a session ID, verification URL, and registry validation results. Requires valid national ID data in the request.
data.reasoning: Summary uses 'national ID' generically when context indicates Mexican registries. Description lacks clarity about the registry scope, what validation results are returned, and the combined nature of the operation. Enhanced version specifies Mexican registry context, explains the streamlined workflow, clarifies outputs, and notes input requirements for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'getSessionMedia' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Original summary 'Query session media' is vague about the retrieval action. Description lacks specificity about what information is returned. Enhanced version clarifies the retrieval action, specifies media types, explains what metadata is included, and provides context about when this operation is useful in the verification workflow.

data.current_description: Query information about all media uploaded during a verification session.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves metadata and information about all media files uploaded for a verification session, including document images, selfies, and PDFs. Returns a list of uploaded media with details such as file type, upload timestamp, and processing status. Useful for verifying upload completion before submitting the session.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Query session media' is vague about the retrieval action. Description lacks specificity about what information is returned. Enhanced version clarifies the retrieval action, specifies media types, explains what metadata is included, and provides context about when this operation is useful in the verification workflow.

message: Operation 'uploadCollectedData' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is vague about what 'additional data' means and lacks clarity on its impact. Missing details about what types of data are accepted, when this can be called, and what is returned. Enhanced version provides examples of acceptable data types, clarifies the optional nature with context about benefits, specifies the return value, and indicates timing flexibility for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Upload additional end-user data for improved fraud detection. Highly recommended but not mandatory.
data.description_suggestion: Uploads additional end-user data (such as device information, behavioral signals, or transaction history) to enhance fraud detection accuracy. While optional, this data significantly improves verification reliability and is highly recommended. Returns confirmation of data receipt. Can be called at any point during the verification session.
data.reasoning: Original description is vague about what 'additional data' means and lacks clarity on its impact. Missing details about what types of data are accepted, when this can be called, and what is returned. Enhanced version provides examples of acceptable data types, clarifies the optional nature with context about benefits, specifies the return value, and indicates timing flexibility for better AI agent understanding.
